description_long: This is a large, elegant house set within a neatly trimmed rectangular plot bordered by hedges. The house features a white facade with tall, arched windows arranged in symmetrical rows, and a complex roofline combining steep gables and flat sections. Mature trees and manicured landscaping surround the property, providing shade and privacy, while a driveway leads to a covered carport with two parked vehicles. The main entrance is accentuated by a small porch with steps and a decorative overhang, and there is a spacious veranda on one side of the house. The rear of the property includes additional outdoor living space, visible through large windows and a glass-enclosed sunroom.
description: A stately white house with arched windows, gabled and flat roofs, surrounded by lush trees, hedges, and a carport with vehicles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical arched windows, carport with two vehicles, and dense landscaping on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof sections, rooftop terrace, carport, and the driveway leading to the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with more arched windows, a prominent tree, and a glass-enclosed sunroom.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the veranda, additional landscaping, and the open backyard area.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a small porch, steps, decorative overhang, and arched doorway
